title: Japanese Episode Transcripts
wikitext:
[]: Japanese Episode Transcripts             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Mon Mar 21, 2005 3:02 pm [Does anybody know] if there is a site that provides transcripts of each Evangelion episode in raw Japanese (preferably in kana/kanji, not rohmaji)? I'd really appreciate it if someone could please point one out to me. Thank you very much!

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Mon Mar 21, 2005 5:47 pm I would hope so. I would figure that the Japanese are even more obsesive then us, so, (I'm assuming you can read Japanese) I would just look around for a Japanese website with them.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Mar 21, 2005 5:58 pm You know what this sight needs? The Japanese equivlent of Eva Monkey. Some guy that could be out contact in Japan and feed us all the information streight from the source!

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Mon Mar 21, 2005 8:11 pm Yeah, that's a good idea, just I think that anyone over in Japan would have spoken up already.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Mar 21, 2005 9:47 pm I have the Japanese scripts here: http://www.reiliberationparade.com.ar/textos/scripts/renewal/index.htm

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 21, 2005 9:58 pm And sometime in the unknown future, all of those scripts will actually be typed up.
